article.title: How Anthropic may have talked itself into an AI export ban
article.summary: Anthropic has warned about the dangers of advanced AI far more often than rival OpenAI this year, according to FT analysis, as critics accuse the company of helping to trigger a US ban on foreign access to its newest models. Five in every 1,000 words used by Anthropic in 2026 related to risk, regulation, or restrictions, according to FT research that analyzed official statements, social media posts, and articles written by the company or its chief, Dario Amodei. The equivalent figure for OpenAI and Sam Altman was eight times lower, at 0.6 words per 1,000. The comparison has become politically charged after Washington last week barred foreign nationals from using Anthropic’s latest models, Mythos and Fable. Some technologists have blamed the decision on the $965 billion AI group’s repeated
article.title_zh: Anthropic 可能已說服自己陷入 AI 出口禁令
article.summary_zh: 根據《金融時報》分析，Anthropic 今年對先進 AI 危害的警告次數遠超對手 OpenAI，評論人士指責該公司導致美國禁止外國使用其最新模型。

article.title: Google preps Pixel ‘Audio Memory’ that ambiently tracks your ‘important conversations,’ like AI notetaker pins
article.summary: Google is working on a new feature called “Audio Memory” for Pixel phones that will “keep track of what you hear throughout your day.”
article.title_zh: Google 推出 Pixel 「Audio Memory」功能，可環境式追蹤您的「重要對話」
article.summary_zh: Google 正開發 Pixel 手機的新功能「Audio Memory」，用於「追蹤您全天所聽到的內容」。

article.title: Best Amazon Prime Day tech deals live — PC hardware deals on SSDs, RAM, GPUs, CPUs, gaming laptops, and more

article.title: I gamed on 2026’s best Snapdragon and Exynos flagship phones — and the benchmarks lied
article.summary: One thing I’ve wanted to find out since the launch of the Galaxy S26 series is just how well Samsung’s new Exynos 2600 chip and its Xclipse 960 GPU stack up when playing the latest Android games. The brand is clearly positioning it as a top-tier gaming platform, especially with its dual-chip strategy for non-Ultra flagships — some customers receive Exynos variants, while the US and select markets use the Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 5 for Galaxy — but can it really compete with Qualcomm’s fastest chip in the business? Samsung’s overclocked ‘for Galaxy’ Snapdragon proved to be a marginal benchmark topper, leaving the Exynos 2600 with a lot of work to do if Samsung wants to offer comparable performance and gaming experience across its entire lineup. To see exactly where Samsung’s new Exynos flagsh
article.title_zh: 我在2026頂級Snapdragon和Exynos旗艦手機上遊戲——基準測試說謊
article.summary_zh: 作者測試了Galaxy S26系列的Exynos 2600芯片遊戲表現，基準測試結果未完全反映實際性能。

article.title: Your agent wants to search like a 2010 quant
article.summary: AI agents need the right information to work well. Whether they manage to find it is the difference between success and failure in most real-world cases, and increasingly so as models get smarter. The practitioners in the field of letting large language models find the information they need have passed through several stages of enlightenment.  The first stage was the vector database period of ’24, when the belief was that all you needed to do was chop text into independent chunks, create an embedding vector for each, and retrieve them via a nearest-neighbor search. This was simple, but alas, it did not work well. Chunks had too little context, and scoring based solely on vector similarity failed to reliably surface useful information.  Enter the second stage , where the lea
article.title_zh: 你的 AI 代理想要像 2010 年的量化交易員一樣搜索
article.summary_zh: AI 代理需要正確的信息才能有效運作，信息檢索能力對於大多數現實案例的成功至關重要，並隨著模型變得更智能而變得越來越重要。

article.title: Taiwanese Brothers Amass $1 Billion From Boom in Display Chips
article.summary: Biing-seng Wu has spent most of his career developing tiny chips that tell pixels on flat-screen displays how and when to light up.
article.title_zh: 台灣兄弟從顯示晶片繁榮中累積 10 億美元
article.summary_zh: Biing-seng Wu 在其職業生涯中大部分時間都在開發微小晶片，這些晶片告訴平面顯示器上的像素如何及何時亮起。

article.title: Philippines taps Google for agentic AI in government services
article.summary: The Philippine government's expanded collaboration with Google Cloud includes a multi-agency cyberdefense alliance and the integration of subsea and terrestrial networks, which will enhance digital connectivity.
article.title_zh: 菲律賓與 Google 合作開發政府服務 agentic AI
article.summary_zh: 菲律賓政府與 Google Cloud 的擴展合作包括多機構網路防禦聯盟和海底及陸地網路整合，將增強數位連接。

article.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
article.summary: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.
article.title_zh: AI晶片製造商Groq確認獲得6.5億美元融資，在Nvidia 20億美元非併購式招聘後重組團隊
article.summary_zh: Groq完成融資、聚焦neocloud業務並任命新的高管團隊，以應對Nvidia的非併購式招聘交易。

article.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
article.summary: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
article.title_zh: 在亞馬遜上以折扣價購買AMD旗艦級Ryzen 7 9800X3D、32GB DDR5記憶體和MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7主機板——Micro Center套裝組合現已推出
article.summary_zh: Micro Center現在在亞馬遜上銷售其部分套裝組合，包括這款9800X3D組合，提供優質的主機板和高速RAM，價格實惠。

article.summary: 上週微軟正式推出企業級AI代理工具Copilot Cowork，並說明用量計費模式對企業用戶的影響。

article.title: Cloudflare推出臨時帳號加速AI代理人部署作業
article.summary: AI代理人大量自動化開發工作，卻常在部署時卡住，為此Cloudflare上周公佈臨時Cloudflare帳號（Temporary Cloudflare Account）的服務，不必註冊Cloudflare帳號就能直接部署應用程式。
article.title_zh: Cloudflare推出臨時帳號加速AI代理人部署作業
article.summary_zh: AI代理人大量自動化開發工作，卻常在部署時卡住，為此Cloudflare上周公佈臨時Cloudflare帳號（Temporary Cloudflare Account）的服務，不必註冊Cloudflare帳號就能直接部署應用程式。
